findings.description:
Section 1.1.4 'Consultation with Dr. Ronald Sneed' is a bold heading in the PDF (matching the style of sibling headings 1.1.1, 1.1.2, 1.1.3, 1.1.5) but is demoted to a plain

tag in the HTML instead of

.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 5 shows '1.1.4. Consultation with Dr. Ronald Sneed' as a bold heading. HTML renders it as:

1.1.4. Consultation with Dr. Ronald Sneed

while all other subsections at the same level use

.

findings.description: Table 4 (Summary Water Withdrawal Data) has a header/data column count mismatch. The HTML thead has 6 <th> elements but each data row has 7 <td> elements. The entity name column (Creedmoor, Durham, Goldsboro, etc.) lacks a corresponding header cell, causing all subsequent columns to be misaligned with their headers.
findings.evidence: HTML thead has: PWSS | Plants | SW Sources | Historical Assumptions | Data Available | Projected Withdrawal Period (6 columns). First data row has: 1 | Creedmoor | Creedmoor WTP | Lake Rogers | using Creedmoor City's... | 1992/1997/2006 data | 1935-2008 (7 columns). The 'Plants' header aligns with the entity name 'Creedmoor' instead of the plant name 'Creedmoor WTP'.

findings.description: In the References section, the URL for the NCDA Water Use Studies is split — only the first portion is hyperlinked and the remainder ('Central.pdf>') appears as unlinked plain text.
findings.evidence: PDF shows: . HTML renders: http://www.agr.state.nc.us/stats/release/WU2007 Central.pdf> — 'Central.pdf' is outside the anchor tag.
